content:
# Session 1 (iter-001) — review summary

First prover round on the freshly-extracted RiemannRoch subproject. 4 lanes
(M1 WeilDivisor, M2 H1Vanishing, M3 OcOfD + RRFormula), `prove` mode, driving
headline #1.

## Sorry deltas (per-file, prover-reported)
- `H1Vanishing.lean`: **2 → 1** (real close). `constant_of_irreducible`
  non-empty branch fully closed + axiom-clean; `injective_flasque` left a
  documented typed sorry (missing Mathlib `j_!`).
- `OcOfD.lean`: 4 → 4 tokens, but the headline `sheafOf` `D≠0` branch went from
  a **bare `else sorry`** to a complete ~430-line sorry-free subsheaf-of-`K_C`
  construction with **one** localized `IsRegularInCodimensionOne` instance sorry.
  `sheafOf_singlePoint`, `sheafOf_ses_single_add` remain blocked sorries.
- `RRFormula.lean`: **1 → 7**. Monolithic sorry decomposed: the connective
  Ext-LES math is now proven; 7 typed sorries remain (6 finiteness + 1
  H²-vanishing). Partly laundering — see below.
- `WeilDivisor.lean`: 3 → 3 (none closed; one bare→precise). 2 new sorry-free
  helpers added.

All four files **build green** (only deprecation/style warnings + documented
sorries). New helpers verified axiom-clean by the prover where claimed.

## Per-target detail

### M2 `constant_of_irreducible` — SOLVED (axiom-clean)
Route: direct sheafification-unit analysis (NOT the chapter's Route-B `P'`-sheaf
sketch). On an irreducible space `toSheafify` of the constant presheaf is
bijective at every non-empty open. 3 new proven private helpers:
`toSheafify_const_restrict` (unit naturality, `const.map = 𝟙`),
`toSheafify_const_app_injective_of_ne_bot` (`equalizerSieve_mem`),
`toSheafify_const_app_surjective_of_ne_bot` (`imageSieve_mem` + `Sheaf.isSeparated`
+ "two non-empty opens of an irreducible space meet" via
`PreirreducibleSpace.isPreirreducible_univ`).
**Coercion-friction dead-ends (reusable):** `rw [toSheafify_const_restrict …]`
does NOT match goals out of `Sheaf.isSeparated` (`ConcreteCategory.hom`/`.obj`/`g.op`
vs `ModuleCat.Hom.hom`/`.val`/`homOfLE` — defeq but not syntactic); use term-mode
`refine (helper).trans ?_` / `congrArg` / `exact`. Collapsing nested restrictions:
`rw [← ModuleCat.comp_apply]` fails; `erw [← ConcreteCategory.comp_apply ×2,
← Functor.map_comp ×2]` then `congrArg … (Subsingleton.elim _ _)` works.

### M2 `injective_flasque` — BLOCKED (missing Mathlib `j_!`)
Reduced to per-`(V≤U)` surjectivity (`intro U V h`), documented the Hartshorne
III.2.4 route. Genuine missing ingredient: no extension-by-zero `j_!` left
adjoint to open-immersion restriction for `Sheaf (Opens X) (ModuleCat kbar)` in
Mathlib b80f227 (only `restrictAdjunction`, wrong direction). Spec in
`informal/injective_flasque.md`.

### M3 `sheafOf` `D≠0` — PARTIAL (done modulo smooth⟹DVR instance)
Generalised OCofP's `lineBundleAtClosedPoint.carrier*` chain to an arbitrary
divisor `D`. Disjunctive `f=0` clause REQUIRED (negative coeff ⇒ junk
`ord(0)=0` fails the pure bound). Could not thread
`[IsRegularInCodimensionOne]`/`[IsLocallyNoetherian]` as instance args (breaks
the RRFormula consumer that calls `sheafOf` with only smooth/proper instances);
derived `IsLocallyNoetherian` on the nose from properness and left
`IsRegularInCodimensionOne := ⟨fun _ => sorry⟩` as the single localized gap.

### M3 `eulerCharacteristic_shortExact_add` — PARTIAL / signature-defective
Built the 6-term covariant Ext-LES + new sorry-free `finrank_alternating_six_term`
(axiom-clean alternating-sum rank-counting). All connective math proven. **But
the lemma is false as typed** (no coherence hyp on the abstract `S`): 6 of the 7
residual sorries are `FiniteDimensional (HModule …)` that cannot close — only the
1 `Subsingleton (Ext L S.X₁ 2)` (degree-2 vanishing) is honest infra debt.

### M1 WeilDivisor — 1 BLOCKED-false, 1 PARTIAL, 1 BLOCKED-missing-morphism
`rationalMap_order_finite_support` is **false** under `[IsLocallyNoetherian X]`
alone (in-code counterexample L807-812); its sorry fills a false prop.
`principal_degree_zero` non-constant branch: bare sorry → compiling
decomposition (`hdeg`/`hpoles`/`sub_eq_zero`) reducing to the precise
`deg((f)_0)=deg((f⁻¹)_0)` Hartshorne II.6.9 crux. `degree_positivePart_principal_eq_finrank`
blocked on `ofFunctionFieldEmbedding` + ramification-inertia. 2 new helpers:
`principal_inv`, `degree_eq_degree_positivePart_sub` (latter axiom-clean).

## Headline status — CRITICAL
`lean_verify` (first-hand) on `H1_skyscraperSheaf_finrank_eq_zero` →
`{propext, sorryAx, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`. **The degree-1 H¹ headline is
NOT axiom-clean** — it transitively inherits `sorryAx` from `injective_flasque`
via the `succ` case of `HModule_flasque_subsingleton_aux`'s induction. The
prover's "out-of-cone" claim and the in-file comment (`H1Vanishing.lean:781-783`)
are **formally wrong**. The cheapest unblock is a structural refactor (factor the
`n=0` base case out of the induction so the `i=1` path skips the `succ` case),
NOT building `j_!`.

## Subagent findings (full reports in task_results/)
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker / weildivisor**: CRITICAL — `rationalMap_order_finite_support`
  false-as-typed (`[IsLocallyNoetherian X]`); blueprint excuse-prose L1305-1309
  must be corrected; `principal_inv`, `degree_eq_degree_positivePart_sub`
  unreferenced.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker / rrformula**: must-fix — `eulerCharacteristic_shortExact_add`
  false without coherence hyp (counterexample); blueprint `lem:euler_char_shortExact_add`
  inconsistent with its own `def:eulerChar_curve`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker / h1vanishing**: must-fix — Route-B sketch no longer
  matches the formalized proof; headline transitively `sorryAx` (annotated by
  review); 3 private helpers unreferenced.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker / ocofd**: HONEST, 0 must-fix; 2 major blueprint
  adequacy gaps (smooth⟹DVR regularity instance unflagged; `sheafOf_singlePoint`
  prose-vs-signature drift).
- **lean-auditor / iter001**: PASS, 0 critical, 24 major, 0 minor across 27 files
  (see report; mostly stale process comments + the same false-signature flags).

## Blueprint-doctor (iter-001) — broken cross-refs to surface
- `Cohomology_StructureSheafModuleK.tex`: `\Cref{sec:scheme_toModuleKSheaf}`,
  `\cref{thm:HasExt_Sheaf_Opens_AddCommGrp}`, `\cref{thm:HasSheafify_Opens_AddCommGrp}`
  — no matching `\label`.
- `RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex` and `RiemannRoch_RRFormula.tex`:
  `\cref{prop:rigidity_genus0_curve_to_AV}` — no matching `\label`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `RiemannRoch_H1Vanishing.tex`, `thm:H1_vanishing_flasque` proof block: added
  `% NOTE:` flagging transitive `sorryAx` via `lem:isFlasque_injective` (kept
  `\leanok` — sync's direct-body verdict is locally correct; the note records the
  transitive gap). Justification: `lean_verify` confirms `sorryAx` in the headline.
- `RiemannRoch_H1Vanishing.tex`, `lem:H1_skyscraperSheaf_finrank_eq_zero_main`
  proof block: added `% NOTE:` flagging the same transitive `sorryAx`.
- No `\leanok` add/remove overrides (sync ran this iter, sha `b7b33ab`, +85/−4;
  its local-body verdicts are correct). No `\mathlibok` (no Mathlib re-exports
  this iter). No stale `\notready` found.

## Notes (LOW)
- `OcOfD.sheafOf_zero` LSP reports "uses sorry" transitively through `sheafOf`;
  its docstring "closes" framing is slightly optimistic (own proof `if_pos rfl`
  is complete).
- Many stale process docstrings/line-citations across H1Vanishing.lean and its
  chapter (Tier-3 "pending sorry" notes on now-closed `constant_of_irreducible`,
  stale line refs tex L357/L524/L722) — cleanup for a blueprint-writer.
- `git diff HEAD~1` unavailable — repo has no prior commit (initial import).
